name: Clinical Research Agent
description: Assists researchers with protocol lookup, guideline retrieval, and patient cohort analysis for active clinical trials.

scopes.read:cohort: Read patient cohort data (requires human approval)

skills.name: Protocol Lookup
skills.description: Retrieve and summarise active clinical trial protocols, inclusion/exclusion criteria, and study design parameters.
examples: Find the inclusion criteria for trial NCT-2026-0042
What phase is the BEACON-3 study in?

skills.name: Cohort Analysis
skills.description: Analyse patient cohort demographics, enrollment figures, and outcome summaries. Requires clinical-staff authorisation and human approval for patient-level data.
examples: Compare adverse event rates across treatment arms
